body.purpose: Slot titles and active tab labels.

mono-meta.purpose: Time/duration readouts in slot rows only.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default macOS-like state transitions when motion is added.

components.name: Capture Button
components.description: Primary capture action; rose gradient, only warm gradient in the UI.
components.css: .ds-btn-capture { background: linear-gradient(180deg, #F0B9BC 0%, #D8898F 100%); color: #193646; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; padding: 9px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1); } .ds-btn-capture:hover { opacity: 0.92; } .ds-btn-capture:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #6F8F80; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-capture:active { opacity: 0.8; } .ds-btn-capture:disabled { opacity: 0.45; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Toolbar Button
components.css: .ds-btn-toolbar { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92); color: #193646; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; padding: 9px 12px; border: 1px solid #274E5E24; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, opacity 0.15s; } .ds-btn-toolbar:hover { background: #fff; } .ds-btn-toolbar:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #6F8F80; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-toolbar:active { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7); }

components.name: Slot Row
components.description: Default capture slot row in the Active/Stored list.
components.css: .ds-slot-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 9px; background: #F8FCFDEA; color: #193646; padding: 6px 9px; border-radius: 11px; border: 1px solid #274E5E24; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-slot-play { width: 22px; height: 22px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.88); border-radius: 6px; font-size: 10px; } .ds-slot-meta { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; } .ds-slot-name { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-slot-duration { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; color: #5D7684; font-family: 'SF Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; }

components.name: Slot Row Selected
components.html:
▶
Kick hit0:42
components.css: .ds-slot-row--selected { background: #6F817AEB; color: #F5FFF9; border-color: transparent; } .ds-slot-row--selected .ds-slot-duration { color: rgba(245, 255, 249, 0.72); }

components.name: Chip Surface
components.description: Output bar and compact filter chips.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 9px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55); border: 1px solid #274E5E24; border-radius: 8px; padding: 5px 9px; min-height: 26px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-chip-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: #5D7684; }

components.name: Tab Active
components.description: Active tab pill inside capsule tab bar.
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: inline-flex; gap: 4px; padding: 4px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); border-radius: 999px; } .ds-tab { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; padding: 6px 12px; border: none; border-radius: 999px; background: transparent; color: #193646; cursor: pointer; } .ds-tab--active { background: #C7D8CF; } .ds-tab:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #6F8F80; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: SimplestSampler looks and feels like dependable bench gear in an edit suite: warm neutrals, soft gradients, rounded continuous corners, and a single confident teal accent. The layout is a vertical stack with no nested cards or decorative chrome.
keyCharacteristics: Warm tinted neutrals (not cool gray SaaS defaults)
System SF Pro typography at 10–15px scale
Tonal layering and 1px hairline borders instead of drop shadows
Continuous corner radii (8px chips, 11px rows, 12px panels)
Dual theme with shared semantic roles
Capture gradient as the sole high-saturation warm accent

rules.name: The One Warm Gradient Rule
rules.body: Only Capture (and capturing shortcut state) may use the rose gradient. No other buttons, badges, or headers get warm gradients.

rules.name: The Teal Sparingly Rule
rules.body: Full saturated accent fill appears on selected slot rows and key positive actions — not on every icon or label.

rules.name: The System Scale Rule
rules.body: Stay within 9–15px for working UI. No hero type, no tracked uppercase eyebrows.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Do not add drop shadows to slots, chips, or buttons. If something needs emphasis, change fill or border contrast.

dos: Do use SamplerTheme.swift as the single source of truth for SwiftUI colors, spacing, and radii.
Do mirror dark-theme hex values in SimplestSampler_AS_GUI.mm when changing the AAX panel.
Do keep Capture as the only rose-gradient control.
Do use 1px theme.border strokes on chips and panels for definition without shadow.
Do respect macOS system light/dark/system appearance via SamplerThemeMode.
donts: Don't introduce card-in-card layouts or identical icon+heading+text grids.
Don't use purple gradients, glassmorphism, gradient text, or neon accent floods.
Don't add marketing-page tropes (tracked uppercase eyebrows, hero metrics, decorative motion).
Don't let the AAX plugin drift to generic Avid slider chrome — keep custom slot-bank GUI.
Don't use drop shadows or side-stripe accent borders on slot rows.
